case_title: NILS NORBERG VS. SU HWA WAN

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORBERG, NILS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WAN, SU HWA $4,935.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,985.00, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST PLAINTIFF'S JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $3700.00; AN AMOUNT DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,935.00 FILED BY NORBERG, NILS AS TO DEFENDANT WAN, SU HWA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WAN, SU HWA
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-04-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-04-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, WHO WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-09-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WAN, SU HWA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2011 - JUDGMENT.
